description: ListConnectorEntitiesRequest schema from Amazon AppFlow API

connectorProfileName.description: The name of the connector profile. The name is unique for each ConnectorProfile in the AWS account.

connectorType.description: The type of connector, such as Salesforce, Marketo, and so on.

entitiesPath.description: This optional parameter is specific to connector implementation. Some connectors support multiple levels or categories of entities.

apiVersion.description: The version of the API that's used by the connector.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of items that should be returned in the result set.

nextToken.description: The pagination token for next page of data.
